0
Skip to content
VitePress

Appearance

Sidebar Navigation

api-examples

markdown-examples

On this page
/
2026-03-11
119
1m

Runtime API Examples ​

This page demonstrates usage of some of the runtime APIs provided by VitePress.

The main useData() API can be used to access site, theme, and page data for the current page. It works in both .md and .vue files:

md
<script setup>
import { useData } from 'vitepress'

const { theme, page, frontmatter } = useData()
</script>

## Results

### Theme Data
<pre>{{ theme }}</pre>

### Page Data
<pre>{{ page }}</pre>

### Page Frontmatter
<pre>{{ frontmatter }}</pre>

Results ​

Theme Data ​

  "posts": {
    "allPosts": [
      {
        "url": "/01 Git/01 git 配置信息.html",
        "relativePath": "/01 Git/01 git 配置信息.html",
        "frontmatter": {
          "title": "git 配置信息",
          "date": "2026-03-12 02:00:00",
          "permalink": "/git/git_config",
          "categories": [
            "git"
          ]
        },
        "title": "git 配置信息",
        "date": "2026-03-12 02:00:00",
        "capture": "增\n 增加用户名和邮箱配置\n```shell\ngit config  user.name \"Hina-Amano\"\ngit config  user.email \"cpythonic@gmail.com\"\n```\n---\n 删\n 删除用户名和邮箱配置\n```shell\ngit config  --unset user.name\ngit config  --unset user.email\n```\n---\n 改\n 修改用户名和邮箱配置\n```shell\ngit config  user.name \"Hina-Amano\"\ngit config  user.email \"cpythonic@gma"
      },
      {
        "url": "/01 Git/02 git 优化.html",
        "relativePath": "/01 Git/02 git 优化.html",
        "frontmatter": {
          "title": "git 优化",
          "date": "2026-03-12 02:00:00",
          "permalink": "/git/git_optimize",
          "categories": [
            "git"
          ]
        },
        "title": "git 优化",
        "date": "2026-03-12 02:00:00",
        "capture": "git优化\n 1.开启颜色显示\n```shell\ngit config --global color.ui true\n```\n---\n 2.关闭路径转义(Git 中设置中文文件名不乱码)\n```shell\ngit config core.quotepath false\n```\n---\n 3.处理换行符 (CRLF)\n```shell\n Windows 使用 CRLF，Linux/Mac 使用 LF。为了避免跨平台协作时出现换行符差异的警告或问题\n 提交时转换为 LF，检出时转换为 CRLF（Windows 推荐）\ngit config --global core.autocrlf true\n "
      },
      {
        "url": "/api-examples.html",
        "relativePath": "/api-examples.html",
        "frontmatter": {
          "outline": "deep"
        },
        "title": "Runtime API Examples",
        "date": "2026-03-12 07:14:57",
        "capture": "Runtime API Examples\nThis page demonstrates usage of some of the runtime APIs provided by VitePress.\nThe main `useData()` API can be used to access site, theme, and page data for the current page. It works in both `.md` and `.vue` files:\n```md\n&lt;script setup\nimport { useData } from 'vitepress'\ncon"
      },
      {
        "url": "/",
        "relativePath": "/",
        "frontmatter": {
          "layout": "home",
          "hero": {

      },
      {
        "url": "/markdown-examples.html",
        "relativePath": "/markdown-examples.html",
        "frontmatter": {},
        "title": "Markdown Extension Examples",
        "date": "2026-03-12 07:14:57",
        "capture": "This page demonstrates some of the built-in markdown extensions provided by VitePress.\n Syntax Highlighting\nVitePress provides Syntax Highlighting powered by Shiki, with additional features like line-highlighting:\nInput\n````md\n```js{4}\nexport default {\n  data () {\n    return {\n      msg: 'Highlighte"
      }
    ],
    "originPosts": [
      {
        "url": "/01 Git/01 git 配置信息.html",

          "categories": [

        "title": "git 配置信息",
        "date": "2026-03-12 02:00:00",
        "capture": "增\n 增加用户名和邮箱配置\n```shell\ngit config  user.name \"Hina-Amano\"\ngit config  user.email \"cpythonic@gmail.com\"\n```\n---\n 删\n 删除用户名和邮箱配置\n```shell\ngit config  --unset user.name\ngit config  --unset user.email\n```\n---\n 改\n 修改用户名和邮箱配置\n```shell\ngit config  user.name \"Hina-Amano\"\ngit config  user.email \"cpythonic@gma"
      },
      {
        "url": "/01 Git/02 git 优化.html",
        "relativePath": "/01 Git/02 git 优化.html",
        "frontmatter": {
          "title": "git 优化",
          "date": "2026-03-12 02:00:00",
          "permalink": "/git/git_optimize",
          "categories": [
            "git"
          ]
        },
        "title": "git 优化",
        "date": "2026-03-12 02:00:00",
        "capture": "git优化\n 1.开启颜色显示\n```shell\ngit config --global color.ui true\n```\n---\n 2.关闭路径转义(Git 中设置中文文件名不乱码)\n```shell\ngit config core.quotepath false\n```\n---\n 3.处理换行符 (CRLF)\n```shell\n Windows 使用 CRLF，Linux/Mac 使用 LF。为了避免跨平台协作时出现换行符差异的警告或问题\n 提交时转换为 LF，检出时转换为 CRLF（Windows 推荐）\ngit config --global core.autocrlf true\n "
      },
      {
        "url": "/api-examples.html",

          "outline": "deep"

It works in both `.md` and `.vue` files:\n```md\n&lt;script setup\nimport { useData } from 'vitepress'\ncon"

          "url": "/01 Git/02 git 优化.html",

          "title": "git 优化",
          "date": "2026-03-12 02:00:00",
          "capture": "git优化\n 1.开启颜色显示\n```shell\ngit config --global color.ui true\n```\n---\n 2.关闭路径转义(Git 中设置中文文件名不乱码)\n```shell\ngit config core.quotepath false\n```\n---\n 3.处理换行符 (CRLF)\n```shell\n Windows 使用 CRLF，Linux/Mac 使用 LF。为了避免跨平台协作时出现换行符差异的警告或问题\n 提交时转换为 LF，检出时转换为 CRLF（Windows 推荐）\ngit config --global core.autocrlf true\n "
        }
      ]

                "git"

            },
            "title": "git 优化",
            "date": "2026-03-12 02:00:00",
            "capture": "git优化\n 1.开启颜色显示\n```shell\ngit config --global color.ui true\n```\n---\n 2.关闭路径转义(Git 中设置中文文件名不乱码)\n```shell\ngit config core.quotepath false\n```\n---\n 3.处理换行符 (CRLF)\n```shell\n Windows 使用 CRLF，Linux/Mac 使用 LF。为了避免跨平台协作时出现换行符差异的警告或问题\n 提交时转换为 LF，检出时转换为 CRLF（Windows 推荐）\ngit config --global core.autocrlf true\n "
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    "groupPosts": {
      "categories": {
        "git": [
          {
            "url": "/01 Git/01 git 配置信息.html",
            "relativePath": "/01 Git/01 git 配置信息.html",
            "frontmatter": {
              "title": "git 配置信息",
              "date": "2026-03-12 02:00:00",
              "permalink": "/git/git_config",
              "categories": [
                "git"
              ]
            },
            "title": "git 配置信息",
            "date": "2026-03-12 02:00:00",
            "capture": "增\n 增加用户名和邮箱配置\n```shell\ngit config  user.name \"Hina-Amano\"\ngit config  user.email \"cpythonic@gmail.com\"\n```\n---\n 删\n 删除用户名和邮箱配置\n```shell\ngit config  --unset user.name\ngit config  --unset user.email\n```\n---\n 改\n 修改用户名和邮箱配置\n```shell\ngit config  user.name \"Hina-Amano\"\ngit config  user.email \"cpythonic@gma"
          },
          {
            "url": "/01 Git/02 git 优化.html",
            "relativePath": "/01 Git/02 git 优化.html",
            "frontmatter": {
              "title": "git 优化",
              "date": "2026-03-12 02:00:00",
              "permalink": "/git/git_optimize",
              "categories": [
                "git"
              ]
            },
            "title": "git 优化",
            "date": "2026-03-12 02:00:00",
            "capture": "git优化\n 1.开启颜色显示\n```shell\ngit config --global color.ui true\n```\n---\n 2.关闭路径转义(Git 中设置中文文件名不乱码)\n```shell\ngit config core.quotepath false\n```\n---\n 3.处理换行符 (CRLF)\n```shell\n Windows 使用 CRLF，Linux/Mac 使用 LF。为了避免跨平台协作时出现换行符差异的警告或问题\n 提交时转换为 LF，检出时转换为 CRLF（Windows 推荐）\ngit config --global core.autocrlf true\n "
          }
        ]
      },
      "tags": {}
    },
    "groupCards": {
      "categories": [
        {
          "name": "git",
          "length": 2
        }
      ],
      "tags": []
    }
  }
}
